prose:
Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on water (H₂O, 3 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, via PySCF RKS. No density fitting (exact four-centre integrals). Geometry: user-supplied water.xyz, no re-optimization. SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy=true, all checks passed.

HOMO = −8.6037183 eV, LUMO = +0.33695037 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV (headline value). Total energy = −76.462901 Hartree. The gap is a Kohn–Sham orbital gap (Koopmans-style), not an optical excitation energy. Warnings array was empty (clean run).
